case_title: PROGRESS FINANCIAL CORP VS. JUAN A BARAHONA

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF SEP-12-2014 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF SEP-12-2014 BY JUDGE PRO TEM DAVID YANG. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. PLAINTIFF WAS REPRESENTED BY OMAR OSORIO--LEGAL ASSISTANT. NO COSTS AWARDED BY COURT. PLAINTIFFS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. DEFENDANTS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID YANG. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-12-2014 - JUDGMENT.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $ 55.00 - SERVED FEB-14-2014, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT BARAHONA, JUAN A
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-11-2014 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF TO SEP-12-2014 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF PROGRESS FINANCIAL CORP
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY PROGRESS FINANCIAL CORP AS TO DEFENDANT BARAHONA, JUAN A ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-11-2014 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE PRO TEM JUDGE DAVID YANG. FILED BY PROGRESS FINANCIAL CORP

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PROGRESS FINANCIAL CORP RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BARAHONA, JUAN A $3,008.83 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,008.83 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
